players.name: Diego Maradona
highlights: Diego Maradona defined elite AM play in the modern game.
Multiple title runs and decisive tournament performances.
Enduring influence on tactical evolution and player development.
players.legacy: Diego Maradona remains a benchmark for AM impact, production, and football culture.
